description: Wind Power LLC offers a 'Wind Farm Installation Service'. A new order has just come in from Apex Energy, and you must define the standard project template and deploy it for this new sale. Your job is to: 1. Create a Project Template named 'Standard Wind Installation' with exactly three tasks ('Site Survey', 'Foundation Construction', 'Turbine Erection'). 2. Create and submit a Sales Order for customer 'Apex Energy' for 1 unit of 'Wind Farm Installation Service'. 3. From that Sales Order, generate a linked Project, ensuring you apply the 'Standard Wind Installation' template so it auto-populates the tasks. 4. Navigate to the newly generated Project's tasks and mark the 'Site Survey' task as 'Completed'. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
